name: Chocolate Mint Sugar Cookie Drops
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House mint-flavored semi-sweet chocolate morsels (10 oz)
Assorted colored sugars or additional granulated sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine granulated sugar and oil. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in vanilla extract.
4. Gradually beat in the flour mixture. Stir in Nestle Toll House mint-flavored semi-sweet chocolate morsels.
5. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into balls; roll in colored sugar.
6. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake 8-10 minutes until set. Let stand on cookie sheets for 2 minutes.
8. Remove from cookie sheets and allow to cool completely.
9. Makes about 5 1/2 dozen cookies.
